_comment: Calibration gold set: topics verified by hand, used to measure how faithfully DeepSeek can re-extract each paper. `slug` maps to src/content/topics/<slug>.json (the known-good answer). Provide the source per entry: `pmid` (open-access, auto-fetched from Europe PMC), or `file` (a local path to the PDF/XML you supply for paywalled papers). Drop paywalled PDFs at scripts/ingest/sources/<slug>.pdf.

entries.type: meta-2x2 + reported-OR; forest images + supplemental tables
entries.note: AJOG 2023; paywalled — supply the PDF. Hardest type: per-trial counts live in supplemental forest images.

entries.type: meta mixed 2x2 / continuous(MD) / continuousEffect; multi-arm shared control
entries.note: BMC Pregnancy Childbirth 2024; open access — should fetch from Europe PMC.

entries.type: meta reported-RR from a research-letter forest plot
entries.note: JACC letter 2018; paywalled — supply the PDF.

entries.type: meta reported-HR, observational/prognostic; multiple forest plots
entries.note: Heart Fail Rev 2025 (NIH author manuscript in PMC).
McFarland & Li 2025 review — supply the PDF.
